summary:
There is no documented synonymy between acrocephaly and terms such as oxycephaly, turticephaly, or "dome-shaped skull" based on the available clinical literature. Thus, due to complete absence of supporting evidence, the claim that acrocephaly has any of these names cannot be validated.  

Final Answer: \boxed{\text{N/A}}
